name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Net Execution
notes:
Detects suspicious reconnaissance command line activity on Windows systems using the PowerShell Get-LocalGroupMember Cmdlet

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Michael Haag, Mark Woan (improvements), James Pemberton / @4A616D6573 / oscd.community (improvements)
SIGMA Title: Net.exe Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of Net.exe, whether suspicious or benign.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Net Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [net.exe or net1.exe]

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% group%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% localgroup%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% user%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% view%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% share%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% accounts%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% stop %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% start%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Net Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [net.exe or net1.exe]

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% group%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% localgroup%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% user%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% view%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% share%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% accounts%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% stop %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% start%') AQL filter query
